# GitHub Repository Settings

## About Section

**Description:**
A security auditing framework for Lightning Network infrastructure. Comprehensive configuration scanning and runtime checks for LND nodes.

**Website:**
https://nonsoamadi10.github.io/lnaudit/

**Topics (tags):**
- lightning-network
- bitcoin
- security
- lnd
- security-audit
- security-scanner
- lightning
- bitcoin-lightning
- cybersecurity
- infrastructure
- devops
- fintech
- cryptocurrency
- security-tools
- audit

## Social Preview

Use the lnaudit logo or a professional security-themed banner showing:
- Project name: lnaudit
- Tagline: "Security auditing for Lightning Network infrastructure"
- Clean, professional design with lightning bolt iconography

## Repository Settings

### Features
- [x] Issues
- [x] Projects  
- [x] Wiki
- [x] Discussions
- [x] Sponsorships (if applicable)

### Pull Requests
- [x] Allow squash merging
- [x] Allow rebase merging
- [ ] Allow merge commits
- [x] Automatically delete head branches

### Security
- [x] Dependency graph
- [x] Dependabot alerts
- [x] Dependabot security updates
- [x] Code scanning alerts
- [x] Secret scanning alerts

## Branch Protection (main)

- [x] Require pull request reviews before merging (1 reviewer)
- [x] Require status checks to pass before merging
  - CI tests must pass
  - Linting must pass
- [x] Require branches to be up to date before merging
- [x] Require signed commits
- [ ] Include administrators (allow flexibility for sole maintainer)

## Labels

Create these labels for better issue management:

- `security` (red) - Security-related issues
- `enhancement` (green) - New features
- `bug` (red) - Bug reports  
- `documentation` (blue) - Documentation improvements
- `good first issue` (green) - Good for newcomers
- `help wanted` (purple) - Extra attention needed
- `check:permissions` (yellow) - Permission check module
- `check:transport` (yellow) - Transport security module
- `check:privacy` (yellow) - Privacy check module
- `check:live` (yellow) - Live runtime checks
- `CVE` (red) - Related to CVE database
